ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of writing or taking notes. It starts with the robot's arms at rest, then transitions to a writing posture, and finally returns to rest.  The right arm performs the main writing motion, while the left arm provides support or rests on a surface.  The sequence emphasizes the motion of the right arm, which is crucial for conveying the action of writing.  The left arm's movement creates balance and provides context to the action.  I will use the two joints on the robot's shoulder to create a realistic writing motion, avoiding any unnatural or stiff movements.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready to write
right arm moves to write, left arm supports
writing finishes, arms return to rest
